violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
Food dispensing equipment were observed stored in close proximity to hand sink. Food and equipment must be protected from miscellaneous sources of contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
The top panel of the ice machine was in poor repair (observed covered with tape). New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in poor repair: 1) The floor tiles in the front service area were cracked/broken 2) Holes and gaps were observed in bottom area of wall in storage area New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2024
The floors throughout the storage areas were observed with an accumulation of old rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023
